scope_boundary: Public-safe local external Circle KV-cache ring-buffer receipt import only. The slice records one pinned `CC-AI-CONTRACT-KV-001` structural fixture at Circle commit `63b0f511`, stale-token and sink-window fields, three required theorem IDs, contract fingerprint `bfebf150ce45d1eb124ea553bf2ba8c62008751ebec9f8600b83cc09e0526a46`, command-output digests, and a passing Circle CLI test summary. It does not prove deployed KV-cache behavior, serving throughput, memory savings, paging correctness, retrieval quality, context length, model quality, transfer, safety, ASI, or Coil chapter-core promotion.
transition_reason: The KV-cache receipt slice makes one Circle ring-buffer structural fixture concrete in the book and closes the stale 'no KV-cache receipt import' blocker for the Coil chapter. The evidence remains an external-project receipt import with no deployed ASI-side serving trace, no paging or throughput measurement, no retrieval-quality workload, no model-quality result, and no independent review, so it blocks promotion rather than moving support state.
required_artifacts: fresh public Circle replay or archived public KV-cache contract pack
repository-owned command that reruns the relevant Circle KV-cache proof target or verifies an archived replay bundle
deployed or replayed ASI-side KV-cache serving trace
ordinary KV-cache and sink/rolling-window baselines with workload metrics
paging, throughput, memory-savings, retrieval-quality, and model-quality measurements for any promoted claim
accepted evidence-transition record for any narrowed upward support movement
negative_results: no deployed KV-cache behavior is claimed
no serving throughput or memory-savings measurement is claimed
no paging correctness, retrieval-quality, model-quality, transfer, safety, or ASI claim is promoted
no chapter core claim is promoted
downgrade_triggers: stale-token or sink-window evidence field drift
external-project receipt import described as deployed KV-cache behavior
serving throughput, memory-savings, paging, retrieval-quality, model-quality, transfer, safety, ASI, or support-state promotion claimed without a separate accepted transition
promotion_burden: Move above argument only for a narrowed KV-cache claim after a fresh public Circle replay or archived public contract pack, repository-owned proof/replay verification, deployed or replayed ASI-side serving traces, ordinary baselines, paging/throughput/memory/retrieval/model-quality measurements for the specific claim, and independent review are recorded with a separate accepted upward transition.

external Circle checkout is not vendored into this public repository

acceptance_blockers: no fresh public Circle replay inside this repository
